name: Agent API
description: Expose Evonic agents via an OpenAI-compatible REST API. Bearer-token-authenticated chat completions with quota and model-scoping.
author: Evonic

variables.name: DISABLE_CORS
variables.label: Disable CORS Protection
variables.description: When enabled, adds Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * to all API responses so endpoints can be called from any browser origin.

variables.name: MODEL_AGENT_MAP
variables.label: Model → Agent Mapping
variables.description: JSON mapping public model names (keys) to internal agent IDs (values). Used by /v1/models and /v1/chat/completions.
